presentation.latex: for straightforward problems like “2+3=?”, reasoning LLMs can exhibit overconfidence or uncertainty. Recent research [124] notes that o1-like models tend to generate multiple solution rounds for easier math problems, often exploring unnecessary paths. This behavior contrasts with the lack of diverse exploratory actions for simpler questions, indicating
